input.background: An investigation into the possible effects on non-smokers of allowing smoking in a shared office environment.
input.question: Measured the lung capacity on a scale of 1 to 5 (where 1 was poor and 5 was excellent) of the nonsmoking office staff before smoking was banned, and on the same staff a month after a ban on smoking had been enforced?

output.answer: A Wilcoxon matched-pairs test would be suitable for these paired samples of ranked scores.

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
